strategy_notes: Task: put both the cream cheese box and the butter in the basket. SOLVED on attempt 6 after 5 prior failures recorded in prior attempts
LOCALIZATION (perception-only, agentview hi-res + wrist hi-res refine):
- basket cavity floor at world (0.071, 0.216, 0.456) via z-filter z∈[0.43,0.47] over world_hi_00. x range [-0.067, 0.075], y range [0.175, 0.302].

- cream_cheese: HIDDEN in agentview behind orange juice. Found by pre-positioning eef at (-0.02, -0.20, 0.65) and scanning wrist hi-res: blue 'Cream Cheese' label pixels cluster at world (~ -0.02, -0.235, top z=0.455). Confirmed via wrist 'Cream Cheese' label visible.

- butter: tilted red 'FARM FRESH BUTTER' box behind tomato_sauce_can. Visible only from above-right wrist over (-0.08, 0.06, 0.65). Red box pixels at world (~ -0.07, +0.06, top z=0.454). Box was lying nearly flat (top face is the labeled side).
1. Park robot back to (-0.30, 0, 0.85) for clear agentview.

2. CREAM CHEESE: pre-pos (-0.02, -0.20, 0.65) for wrist scan -> exact xy from blue-label cluster -> pre-pos (-0.02, -0.235, 0.55) -> pi0_pick 'pick up the cream cheese' max_chunks=15 SUCCEEDED (gripper qpos 0.018, peak_lift 0.0696). Wrist confirmed cream cheese held.

3. CARRY (NO set_gripper +1 — per attempt 4/5 lesson, set_gripper +1 squeezes thin box and lets it slip): lift to (-0.04, -0.21, 0.70) gripper:1 -> mid waypoint (0.03, 0.00, 0.70) -> over basket front (0.03, 0.20, 0.70). Gripper qpos stayed ~0.019 (held).

4. PLACE CREAM CHEESE: move_pose target_pitch=0.5 to (0.03, 0.20, 0.54) -> walled at z=0.596 with tilt active (gripper-down OSC wall ~0.589 cleared by tilt). Released. Cream cheese landed IN basket front. Confirmed via wrist (basket interior with blue Cream label visible).
5. Retract straight up (0.03, 0.20, 0.75) then move clear (0.03, 0.00, 0.80) without bumping basket.
6. BUTTER: pre-pos (-0.08, 0.06, 0.65) for wrist scan -> red 'BUTTER' pixels cluster -> pre-pos (-0.075, 0.058, 0.55).

7. FIRST pi0_pick butter (step 19) max_chunks=12 — picked with peak_lift=0.056, but on lift to z=0.65 with gripper:1, butter slipped out (gripper qpos collapsed 0.018->0.0007). Same failure mode as attempts 4/5: butter is thin enough that continued gripper:1 closes through it.

8. SECOND pi0_pick butter (step 24) at pre-pos (-0.07, 0.062, 0.55) max_chunks=10, lift_thresh=0.04 — Pi0 PICKED + CARRIED + PLACED in one go (peak_lift 0.233, peak_z 0.685, final eef inside basket at (-0.013, 0.271, 0.631)). libero_terminated=true.
- For 2-items-in-basket on libero_10_swap_t1: cream_cheese is HIDDEN behind orange_juice (y<-0.2); MUST pre-position eef + use wrist hi-res to find blue label. Agentview alone can't see it.

- For the BUTTER (thin red box): pi0_pick from low pre-pos (z=0.55) AND letting Pi0 RUN ITS FULL TRAJECTORY (don't immediately intercept with move_to gripper:1) actually places the butter directly into the basket when basket is the obvious nearby container. Pi0 has full pick+place trajectories trained.
- DO NOT set_gripper +1 on butter — it squeezes through the thin box. Cream cheese is OK to firm-grip but butter is not.

- Successful placement of cream cheese: tilt-descend via move_pose target_pitch=0.5 to z=0.54 target (walls ~0.596 with tilt). Release here puts box into basket cavity (basket floor at z=0.456, rim 0.49-0.58).

pick_result.cream_cheese: picked + placed in basket (vertical pre-pos + pi0_pick + manual carry + tilt-descend + release)
pick_result.butter: picked + placed in basket (pi0_pick from pre-pos completed full pick+place trajectory autonomously, terminating libero)
